title: DeepFilterNet4 Run Configuration
description:
Configuration schema for df_mlx.train_dynamic run configs.

This schema defines the complete runtime configuration for training DeepFilterNet4 models with MLX backend, including dataset, training parameters, model architecture, loss functions, and debugging options.

docs.main:
# DeepFilterNet4 Run Configuration

Complete configuration schema for training with `df_mlx.train_dynamic`. Supports dynamic dataset configuration, multi-loss training, GAN adversarial training, and comprehensive VAD (Voice Activity Detection) integration.

dataset.title: Dataset Configuration
dataset.description: Configure dataset paths, mixing parameters, SNR ranges, and audio augmentation strategies.

docs.main:
Dataset configuration paths and mixing parameters.

- **Lists** can point to plain text files with paths (one per line) for speech, noise, and RIRs
- **SNR ranges** control signal-to-noise mixing ratios in dB
- **Probabilities** control frequency of augmentation application (0-1)

cache_dir.title: Audio Cache Directory
cache_dir.description: Path to pre-built audio cache (from build_audio_cache.py). If provided, speeds up data loading by using cached spectrograms.

speech_list.title: Speech File List
speech_list.description: Path to file containing speech file paths (one per line). Speech comprises the clean signal portion of training mixtures.

noise_list.title: Noise File List
noise_list.description: Path to file containing noise file paths (one per line). Noise is mixed with speech to create noisy targets.

rir_list.title: Room Impulse Response List
rir_list.description: Path to file containing RIR file paths (one per line). RIRs simulate room acoustics.

config.title: Mixer Configuration Path
config.description: Dataset/mixer config JSON path specifying mixing strategy and augmentation settings.

snr_range.title: Base SNR Range (dB)
snr_range.description: Override base Signal-to-Noise Ratio range in dB. Example: [-5, 40] means SNR varies from -5 dB (noisy) to +40 dB (clean).

snr_range_extreme.title: Extreme SNR Range (dB)
snr_range_extreme.description: Override extreme Signal-to-Noise Ratio range in dB (e.g., [-20, -5]). Very noisy conditions sampled with probability p_extreme_snr.

p_extreme_snr.title: Extreme SNR Probability
p_extreme_snr.description: Probability of sampling from extreme SNR range (0-1). Controls data augmentation diversity.

snr_range_very_low.title: Very Low SNR Range (dB)
snr_range_very_low.description: Override very-low Signal-to-Noise Ratio range in dB (e.g., [-30, -20]). Extremely challenging conditions.

p_very_low_snr.title: Very Low SNR Probability
p_very_low_snr.description: Probability of sampling from very-low SNR range (0-1).

p_interfer_speech.title: Interfering Speech Probability
p_interfer_speech.description: Probability of adding interfering (competing) speaker to the mixture (0-1). Improves robustness to multi-speaker scenarios.

speech_gain_range.title: Speech Gain Range (dB)
speech_gain_range.description: Override speech gain range in dB (e.g., [-12, 12]). Applied as volume augmentation to the speech component.

noise_gain_range.title: Noise Gain Range (dB)
noise_gain_range.description: Override noise gain range in dB (e.g., [-12, 12]). Applied as volume augmentation to the noise component.

augmentation.title: Audio Augmentation
augmentation.description: Audio augmentation configuration controlling probabilistic application of effects.

docs.main: Augmentation parameters control data-time effects applied during training to improve model robustness.

p_reverb.title: Reverb Probability
p_reverb.description: Probability of applying reverb/room acoustics simulation (0-1).

p_clipping.title: Clipping Distortion Probability
p_clipping.description: Probability of applying clipping distortion (0-1) - simulates microphone saturation.

training.title: Training Configuration
training.description: Training hyperparameters including learning rate, batch size, and optimization settings.

docs.main: Hyperparameters for model training using AdamW optimizer with cosine annealing schedule and optional warmup/curriculum learning.

epochs.title: Training Epochs
epochs.description: Total number of training epochs (passes through the dataset).

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Number of samples per batch. Larger batches improve stability but require more GPU memory.

learning_rate.title: Initial Learning Rate
learning_rate.description: Starting learning rate for the optimizer. Follows cosine annealing schedule.

learning_rate_min.title: Minimum Learning Rate
learning_rate_min.description: Minimum learning rate for cosine annealing schedule. If null, defaults to 1% of base learning rate.

weight_decay.title: Weight Decay
weight_decay.description: L2 regularization coefficient for AdamW optimizer. Prevents overfitting.

warmup_epochs.title: Warmup Epochs
warmup_epochs.description: Number of epochs to linearly warm up learning rate from 0 to base LR.

curriculum_warmup_epochs.title: Curriculum Learning Warmup
curriculum_warmup_epochs.description: Curriculum learning warmup epochs (0=disabled). SNR and interferer probabilities gradually ramp from 0 to target values.

patience.title: Early Stopping Patience
patience.description: Number of validation steps with no improvement before early stopping (0=disabled).

grad_accumulation_steps.title: Gradient Accumulation Steps
grad_accumulation_steps.description: Number of batches to accumulate gradients before optimizer step. Simulates larger effective batch size.

max_grad_norm.title: Maximum Gradient Norm
max_grad_norm.description: Clip gradients to this norm value to prevent exploding gradients.

eval_frequency.title: Synchronization/Eval Frequency
eval_frequency.description: Synchronize metrics and perform evaluation every N batches.

fp16.title: Mixed Precision Training
fp16.description: Enable FP16 mixed precision: true/false or 'auto' for hardware default.

enumValues: Enable FP16 - uses lower precision for faster training
Disable FP16 - use full FP32 precision
Automatic - hardware determines optimal precision
No override - use system default

seed.title: Random Seed
seed.description: Optional RNG seed override for reproducibility (-1 disables override).

train_config.title: Legacy Train Config Path
train_config.description: Path to train.py-compatible INI config file (optional, for backwards compatibility).

dataloader.title: Data Loader Configuration
dataloader.description: Configuration for efficient batch loading and data pipeline management.

docs.main: Control data loading parallelization, prefetching, and batch limits for optimal throughput.

num_workers.title: Number of Workers
num_workers.description: Number of parallel data loading processes. Higher values can improve throughput but increase memory usage.

prefetch_size.title: Prefetch Size
prefetch_size.description: Number of batches to prefetch for smoother data pipeline.

use_mlx_data.title: Use MLX Data Stream
use_mlx_data.description: Use MLXDataStream backend if available for optimized data loading on Apple Silicon.

max_train_batches.title: Max Training Batches per Epoch
max_train_batches.description: Limit number of training batches per epoch (-1 or null disables limit). Useful for fast iteration.

max_valid_batches.title: Max Validation Batches per Epoch
max_valid_batches.description: Limit number of validation batches per epoch (-1 or null disables limit).

checkpoint.title: Checkpoint Management
checkpoint.description: Configure checkpoint saving, resumption, and recovery strategies.

docs.main: Checkpoint configuration for model persistence, training resumption, and data state recovery. Supports auto-detection or explicit checkpoint paths.

checkpoint_dir.title: Checkpoint Directory
checkpoint_dir.description: Directory where model checkpoints will be saved.

save_strategy.title: Checkpoint Save Strategy
save_strategy.description: When to save checkpoints: 'no' (never), 'epoch' (every epoch), or 'steps' (every N steps).

enumValues: No checkpointing
Save after each epoch
Save every N steps (configured in save_steps)

save_steps.title: Steps Between Checkpoints
save_steps.description: Save checkpoint every N steps (used when save_strategy is 'steps').

save_total_limit.title: Maximum Checkpoints to Keep
save_total_limit.description: Maximum number of recent checkpoints to keep (-1 or null disables pruning, keeps all).

checkpoint_batches.title: Data Checkpoint Frequency
checkpoint_batches.description: Save data checkpoint every N batches (0 disables). Enables faster data state resumption.

resume.title: Resume Training
resume.description: Resume from checkpoint: true (auto-detect), false (start fresh), or explicit checkpoint path.

docs.main: Resume from a previous checkpoint. Set to true for auto-detection, false to start fresh, or provide a path to a specific checkpoint directory or file.

resume_data.title: Resume Data State
resume_data.description: Resume data iterator state: true (auto-detect), false (start fresh), or explicit path.

check_chkpts.title: Validate Checkpoints at Startup
check_chkpts.description: Verify checkpoints are loadable before starting training.

model.title: Model Architecture
model.description: Model architecture selection and variant configuration.

docs.main: Choose backbone architecture (Mamba, GRU, or Attention) and model size (full or lite). Mamba is recommended for optimal performance.

enumValues: Mamba - State-space model backbone (recommended for efficiency)
GRU - Gated Recurrent Unit (traditional RNN)
Attention - Transformer attention backbone
Full - Standard model size with full capacity
Lite - Compressed variant for faster inference

loss.title: Loss Function Configuration
loss.description: Configuration for loss functions including basic MSE, AWESOME, Multi-resolution STFT, and auxiliary losses.

docs.main: Multi-component loss function combining reconstruction loss, AWESOME perceptual loss, Multi-resolution STFT loss, and optional GAN adversarial signal. Choose dynamic_loss strategy: 'baseline' (MSE), 'awesome' (AWESOME + MSE), or 'pipeline_awesome' (pipeline integration).

dynamic_loss.title: Dynamic Loss Strategy
dynamic_loss.description: Loss function strategy: 'baseline' (MSE only), 'awesome' (AWESOME + MSE), or 'pipeline_awesome' (pipeline integrated).

enumValues: Baseline MSE loss - simple reconstruction error
AWESOME + MSE - adds perceptual quality loss
Pipeline AWESOME - integrated into data pipeline

awesome.title: AWESOME Loss Configuration
awesome.description: AWESOME loss parameters (used when dynamic_loss is 'awesome' or 'pipeline_awesome'). Provides perceptually-weighted speech enhancement.

docs.main: AWESOME (Attention-Weighted Spectral Loss for Optimization of Model Enhancement) improves perceptual quality by weighting loss based on speech activity and frequency importance.

loss_weight.title: AWESOME Loss Weight
loss_weight.description: Weight of AWESOME loss relative to baseline loss (0-1). Higher values emphasize perceptual quality.

mask_sharpness.title: Mask Sharpness
mask_sharpness.description: Speech/noise mask sharpness factor. Higher values create sharper boundaries between speech and noise.

warmup_steps.title: AWESOME Warmup Steps
warmup_steps.description: Number of training steps before AWESOME loss is applied. Allows model to learn basic reconstruction first.

proxy_enabled.title: Enable VAD Proxy Gating
proxy_enabled.description: Enable cheap VAD proxy gating for speech/silence decision.

mrstft.title: Multi-Resolution STFT Loss
mrstft.description: Multi-resolution Short-Time Fourier Transform loss for frequency-domain reconstruction accuracy.

docs.main: STFT loss evaluates reconstruction quality across multiple frequency resolutions, improving overall spectral accuracy.

factor.title: MRSTFT Loss Weight
factor.description: Multi-resolution STFT loss weight relative to baseline (0 disables).

gamma.title: Magnitude Compression Exponent
gamma.description: Exponent for magnitude compression (log-scale weighting). Higher values emphasize smaller magnitudes.

f_complex.title: Complex Loss Weight
f_complex.description: Weight for complex-valued (magnitude + phase) loss component. Null disables complex loss (phase ignored).

fft_sizes.title: FFT Sizes
fft_sizes.description: FFT window sizes for multi-resolution analysis.

hop_sizes.title: Hop Sizes
hop_sizes.description: Hop sizes for STFT (stride). If null, defaults to fft_size / 4 for each FFT size.

gan.title: GAN Adversarial Training
gan.description: Generative Adversarial Network configuration for adversarial training. Improves speech naturalness but requires careful tuning.

docs.main: Adversarial training using Multiple Discriminators (MPD, MSD). Adds discriminator loss to generator training for improved speech quality. Recommended only for advanced users - leave disabled for baseline training.

enabled.title: Enable GAN Training
enabled.description: Enable adversarial GAN training (training with discriminators).

start_epoch.title: GAN Start Epoch
start_epoch.description: Epoch to begin GAN training (0-based). Allows model to learn basic reconstruction before adding adversarial component.

ramp_epochs.title: GAN Weight Ramp-up
ramp_epochs.description: Linearly ramp GAN adversarial and feature matching weights over N epochs (0 disables ramp).

adv_weight.title: Adversarial Loss Weight
adv_weight.description: Generator adversarial loss weight. Controls strength of discriminator feedback.

fm_weight.title: Feature Matching Loss Weight
fm_weight.description: Feature matching loss weight (intermediate discriminator features). Stabilizes training.

discriminator.title: Discriminator Type
discriminator.description: Discriminator architecture: 'combined' (both MPD and MSD), 'mpd' (Multi-Period), or 'msd' (Multi-Scale).

enumValues: Combined - Uses both Multi-Period and Multi-Scale discriminators
MPD - Multi-Period Discriminator only
MSD - Multi-Scale Discriminator only

msd_scales.title: MSD Number of Scales
msd_scales.description: Number of scales for Multi-Scale Discriminator.

disc_lr.title: Discriminator Learning Rate
disc_lr.description: Learning rate for discriminator optimizer (usually equal to generator LR).

disc_grad_clip.title: Discriminator Gradient Clipping
disc_grad_clip.description: Maximum gradient norm for discriminator to prevent instability.

disc_update_freq.title: Discriminator Update Frequency
disc_update_freq.description: Update discriminator every N generator steps (1 = every step, N > 1 = slower updates).

vad.title: Voice Activity Detection Configuration
vad.description: Voice Activity Detection (VAD) settings for speech activity measurement and speech-centric loss weighting.

docs.main: VAD (Voice Activity Detection) configuration includes auxiliary VAD loss for speech detection, SNR gating for noisy conditions, frequency band selection, and evaluation settings. Improves performance on challenging scenarios.

loss_weight.title: VAD Loss Weight
loss_weight.description: Weight of VAD auxiliary loss component relative to main loss.

threshold.title: VAD Speech Threshold
threshold.description: VAD probability threshold for speech/silence classification and gating (0-1).

margin.title: VAD Margin
margin.description: VAD margin for smooth transitions between speech and silence regions.

speech_loss_weight.title: VAD Speech Structure Loss
speech_loss_weight.description: Weight for VAD speech-structure loss (auxiliary fine-grained VAD loss).

warmup_epochs.title: VAD Warmup Epochs
warmup_epochs.description: Number of epochs before applying VAD loss (allows initial model training).

snr_gate_db.title: SNR Gate Threshold (dB)
snr_gate_db.description: SNR gate threshold in dB. Below this threshold, SNR gates VAD output.

snr_gate_width.title: SNR Gate Softness (dB)
snr_gate_width.description: SNR gate transition width (softness) in dB. Controls smoothness of SNR gating.

band_low_hz.title: Speech Band Low Cutoff (Hz)
band_low_hz.description: Low frequency cutoff for speech detection band (Hz).

band_high_hz.title: Speech Band High Cutoff (Hz)
band_high_hz.description: High frequency cutoff for speech detection band (Hz).

z_threshold.title: VAD Z-Score Threshold
z_threshold.description: Z-score threshold for statistical VAD (0 = disabled).

z_slope.title: VAD Z-Score Slope
z_slope.description: Z-score slope parameter for smooth transitions.

eval.title: VAD Evaluation Configuration
eval.description: Options for evaluating VAD performance during training.

mode.title: VAD Evaluation Mode
mode.description: VAD eval mode strategy: 'auto' (best available), 'proxy' (fast), 'silero' (accurate external), or 'off' (disabled).

enumValues: Auto - Use best available evaluator
Proxy - Use fast built-in proxy evaluator
Silero - Use Silero ONNX model (requires model file)
Off - Disable VAD evaluation

every.title: VAD Evaluation Frequency
every.description: Evaluate VAD metrics every N epochs.

batches.title: VAD Evaluation Batches
batches.description: Number of batches to use for VAD metrics computation.

max_seconds.title: Max Clip Length for VAD Eval
max_seconds.description: Maximum seconds per clip for VAD evaluation (0 disables limit).

silero_model_path.title: Silero VAD Model Path
silero_model_path.description: Path to silero_vad.onnx model file (required when mode='silero').

silero_sample_rate.title: Silero Sample Rate
silero_sample_rate.description: Sample rate for Silero VAD model (Hz). Must match model requirements.

train.title: VAD Training Regularization
train.description: VAD training regularizer configuration for on-the-fly VAD robustness improvement.

prob.title: VAD Regularizer Probability
prob.description: Probability that VAD regularizer will be applied per batch (0-1).

every_steps.title: VAD Regularizer Frequency
every_steps.description: Apply VAD regularizer every N training steps (0 disables frequency-based application).

metrics.title: Evaluation Metrics Configuration
metrics.description: Configuration for metric computation during validation.

eval_sisdr.title: Compute SI-SDR Metric
eval_sisdr.description: Compute SI-SDR (Scale-Invariant Source-to-Distortion Ratio) during validation benchmark (slower but more accurate quality metric).

debug.title: Debugging Configuration
debug.description: Debugging options for troubleshooting numeric stability and model behavior.

docs.main: Debugging utilities for tracking numeric stability, detecting NaN/Inf values, and diagnosing training issues. Recommended for development and troubleshooting only.

verbose.title: Verbose Logging
verbose.description: Enable verbose timing and logging output during training.

debug_numerics.title: Enable Numeric Debugging
debug_numerics.description: Enable numeric debug mode for NaN/Inf detection.

debug_numerics_fail_fast.title: Fail Fast on Non-Finite
debug_numerics_fail_fast.description: Stop training immediately when non-finite (NaN/Inf) values are detected.

debug_numerics_every.title: Numeric Check Frequency
debug_numerics_every.description: Check for numeric issues every N training steps.

debug_numerics_dump_dir.title: Numeric Debug Dump Directory
debug_numerics_dump_dir.description: Directory for saving numeric debug dumps (empty string or null disables).

debug_numerics_dump_arrays.title: Dump Array Slices
debug_numerics_dump_arrays.description: Dump small tensor slices in debug output for detailed inspection.

debug_numerics_max_dumps.title: Maximum Debug Dumps
debug_numerics_max_dumps.description: Maximum number of debug dump files to create.

nan_skip_batch.title: Skip NaN Batches
nan_skip_batch.description: Skip optimizer update when non-finite values are detected (allows training continuation).

train_ini.title: Legacy Train.py INI Configuration
train_ini.description: Embedded legacy train.py INI file sections (optional). Use [train_ini.<section>] to inline INI-style configuration for backwards compatibility. Supported sections: df, train, optim, distortion, deepfilternet4, loss, MultiResSpecLoss, GANLoss, FeatureMatchingLoss.

docs.main: Legacy INI-style configuration fallback. Include entire INI sections here for compatibility with older train.py scripts. Modern configs should use top-level TOML sections instead.
